x_followers.sourceDetail: Manual public-mirror baseline from TwStalker search result: @StablesCouncil showed 117 followers, crawled 5 days before 2026-05-07. Replace with X API once X_BEARER_TOKEN is available.

tiktok_followers.sourceDetail: Public TikTok profile follower count parsed from profile HTML.

collectors.name: local-ledgers
notes: No production merchant directory ledger is wired yet. Demo merchant profiles are intentionally excluded from success metrics.

collectors.name: manual-baselines
notes: Mirrors non-empty manual baselines into the latest snapshot so the dashboard pull state shows every current figure.

collectors.name: x
notes: Set X_BEARER_TOKEN to collect X follower and engagement metrics.

collectors.name: meta
notes: Set META_ACCESS_TOKEN plus INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID and/or FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID to collect Meta metrics.

collectors.name: youtube
notes: Set YOUTUBE_API_KEY to collect YouTube metrics. Discovered channel id: UCM5BEZunwtgndfB9f8R-2rw.

collectors.name: telegram
notes: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN plus chat ids to collect Telegram counts.

collectors.name: public-profiles
notes: moltbook_followers: no stable public count found.
twitch_followers: no stable public count found.
